threats.description: Prompt injection via AI chat interface
threats.citation: OWASP LLM Top 10 — LLM01 (2023); CISA AI Security Guidance 2024
threats.controls: Protect (PR): Input validation and sanitization on chat endpoint; Detect (DE): Attempt logging and pattern monitoring

threats.description: System prompt extraction via adversarial input
threats.citation: OWASP LLM Top 10 — LLM07 (2023); published adversarial AI research
threats.controls: Protect (PR): Prompt hardening and boundary enforcement; Detect (DE): Output content scanning before response delivery

threats.description: Jailbreak leading to out-of-scope information disclosure
threats.citation: OWASP LLM Top 10 — LLM02 (2023); Anthropic safety documentation
threats.controls: Protect (PR): System prompt constraints and topic boundaries; Detect (DE): Output filtering; Respond (RS): Graceful deflection response configured

threats.description: Application Programming Interface (API) key exposure
threats.citation: OWASP Top 10 — A02 Cryptographic Failures (2021); GitHub Secret Scanning advisories
threats.controls: Protect (PR): Keys stored in server-side environment variables only — never in frontend code; Identify (ID): Secret scanning enabled on repository; Govern (GV): No frontend key storage policy enforced
threats.notes: Critical reputational risk — API key exposure on a security professional's platform would be immediately damaging

threats.description: Cost-based denial of service via API endpoint flooding
threats.citation: Cloudflare threat intelligence reports; common API abuse pattern
threats.controls: Protect (PR): Rate limiting controls on AI endpoint; Detect (DE): Usage monitoring and alerting; Respond (RS): Automated blocking on threshold breach

threats.description: Cross-Site Scripting (XSS) via contact form
threats.citation: OWASP Top 10 — A03 Injection (2021); CISA web application security guidance
threats.controls: Protect (PR): Input sanitization and Content Security Policy (CSP) headers; Detect (DE): Cloudflare Web Application Firewall (WAF) managed rules

threats.description: SQL injection via database-connected form inputs
threats.citation: OWASP Top 10 — A03 Injection (2021); CISA web application security guidance
threats.controls: Protect (PR): Parameterized queries; no raw SQL in form handlers; Protect (PR): WAF injection rules active
threats.notes: Reassess if direct database connections added to platform

threats.description: Clickjacking via malicious iframe embedding
threats.citation: OWASP Top 10 — A05 Security Misconfiguration (2021)
threats.controls: Protect (PR): X-Frame-Options DENY header configured; Cloudflare security headers enabled

threats.description: Subdomain takeover via unclaimed DNS records
threats.citation: HackerOne disclosed vulnerability research; CISA DNS security guidance
threats.controls: Identify (ID): Subdomain inventory maintained; Protect (PR): Cloudflare DNS management; Detect (DE): Periodic DNS record audit

threats.description: Exposed administrative dashboard
threats.citation: OWASP Top 10 — A01 Broken Access Control (2021)
threats.controls: Protect (PR): Authentication-gated separate subdomain; rate-limited login; Detect (DE): Failed authentication attempt logging

threats.description: Domain Name System (DNS) hijacking
threats.citation: CISA Advisory AA20-048A; Cloudflare DNS security documentation
threats.controls: Protect (PR): Cloudflare Registrar with DNSSEC enabled; multi-factor authentication on registrar account; Detect (DE): DNS change alerting

threats.description: Transport Layer Security (TLS) certificate expiration or compromise
threats.citation: Common operational failure pattern; CISA patching guidance
threats.controls: Protect (PR): Cloudflare automatic certificate renewal; Detect (DE): Expiration monitoring alert configured; Govern (GV): Certificate review in scheduled maintenance

threats.description: Cloudflare misconfiguration exposing origin server
threats.citation: Cloudflare documentation; known misconfiguration pattern for Pages deployments
threats.controls: Protect (PR): Origin IP masked behind Cloudflare; Protect (PR): Firewall rules blocking non-Cloudflare traffic; Identify (ID): Configuration reviewed at each deployment

threats.description: Environment variable exposure in source code repository
threats.citation: GitHub Secret Scanning alerts; OWASP Top 10 — A02 (2021); CISA software supply chain guidance
threats.controls: Protect (PR): Environment files excluded from version control; Identify (ID): Automated secret scanning enabled; Govern (GV): Pre-commit hooks enforced — zero tolerance policy
threats.notes: Highest reputational risk item in infrastructure surface — no exceptions to this control

threats.description: Software supply chain compromise via third-party package dependency
threats.citation: CISA Advisory AA22-137A — Protecting Against Software Supply Chain Threats
threats.controls: Identify (ID): Dependency audit tooling enabled; Protect (PR): Dependency lockfile committed to repository; Detect (DE): Automated dependency vulnerability alerting
threats.notes: Control is Configured — dependency scanning enabled but not tested under compromise conditions

threats.description: Contact form harvesting personal intake data
threats.citation: CISA data protection guidance; OWASP secure design principles
threats.controls: Protect (PR): Minimal data collection — only what is required for functionality; Govern (GV): No Personally Identifiable Information (PII) stored server-side; data retention policy documented

threats.description: Email interception between contact form and ProtonMail
threats.citation: Proton security documentation; Transport Layer Security (TLS) interception research
threats.controls: Protect (PR): ProtonMail end-to-end encryption on receiving end; TLS enforced on form submission pathway

threats.description: Correlation attack linking site owner to additional personal information
threats.citation: Open Source Intelligence (OSINT) methodology; deanonymization research
threats.controls: Govern (GV): Minimal personal data published — deliberate scope decision; Identify (ID): Personal information exposure reviewed before each site update
threats.notes: Accepted residual risk — some correlation risk is inherent in a public professional platform and has been consciously accepted

threats.description: Job search agent exposing browsing patterns or credentials
threats.citation: Browser fingerprinting research; credential exposure in automated browsing contexts
threats.controls: Protect (PR): Automated browsing in controlled environment; Protect (PR): Separate credentials used for agent activity
threats.notes: Reassess when job search agent is built and deployed — Phase 4

threats.description: Public defacement of resume website
threats.citation: CISA website defacement guidance; common opportunistic attack pattern
threats.controls: Protect (PR): Cloudflare Pages immutable deployment model; Detect (DE): Uptime monitoring with alerting; Respond (RS): Rollback procedure documented and tested

threats.description: AI assistant manipulation into producing unprofessional or damaging output
threats.citation: OWASP LLM Top 10; red team research on constrained language model systems
threats.controls: Protect (PR): System prompt constraints and topic enforcement; Detect (DE): Output filtering before response delivery; Respond (RS): Interaction logging for post-incident review
threats.notes: Elevated Attacker Sophistication and Motivation — technically sophisticated visitors may probe this specifically

threats.description: Security attempt logging data breach exposing visitor information
threats.citation: OWASP Top 10 — A02 (2021); data breach notification considerations
threats.controls: Protect (PR): Internet Protocol (IP) address hashing before storage — raw IPs never retained; Govern (GV): Maximum 100 characters of input logged; Protect (PR): Database access controls enforced

threats.description: Malicious third-party package installation on development laptop enabling home network lateral movement
threats.citation: CISA Advisory AA22-137A; Socket.dev npm threat research; MITRE ATT&CK T1195
threats.controls: Protect (PR): Dependency audit tooling enabled on development laptop; Protect (PR): Dependency lockfile maintained; Identify (ID): Development laptop included in device inventory
threats.notes: Control Effectiveness Rating (CER) reflects assumed post-hardening state — to be validated at May 2026 reassessment

threats.description: Flat network lateral movement via absence of network segmentation
threats.citation: MITRE ATT&CK T1018 Remote System Discovery; T1021 Remote Services; NIST SP 800-115
threats.controls: Protect (PR): Network segmentation controls implemented — Internet of Things (IoT) devices isolated to separate network segment; Identify (ID): Device inventory documented; Detect (DE): Router-level logging enabled
threats.notes: Control Effectiveness Rating (CER) reflects assumed post-hardening state — to be validated at May 2026 reassessment

threats.description: Internet of Things (IoT) device exploitation as home network entry point
threats.citation: CISA Alert AA21-116A; NIST Internal Report (IR) 8259 — IoT Device Cybersecurity; Verizon DBIR 2023
threats.controls: Protect (PR): Default credentials changed on all IoT devices; firmware updates applied and on scheduled review; Protect (PR): IoT devices isolated to separate network segment
threats.notes: Control Effectiveness Rating (CER) reflects assumed post-hardening state — to be validated at May 2026 reassessment

threats.description: WiFi router exploitation enabling full home network traffic visibility
threats.citation: CISA Advisory AA21-259A; NIST SP 800-189; Verizon DBIR 2024 — SOHO router exploitation
threats.controls: Protect (PR): Default credentials changed; firmware updated; Universal Plug and Play (UPnP) disabled; remote management disabled; Detect (DE): Router logging enabled
threats.notes: Control Effectiveness Rating (CER) reflects assumed post-hardening state — to be validated at May 2026 reassessment

threats.description: Cable modem firmware vulnerability exposing Wide Area Network (WAN) surface
threats.citation: CISA Advisory AA19-024A; CVE-2019-19494 Cable Haunt; NIST SP 800-189
threats.controls: Protect (PR): Owner-managed firmware updates on scheduled review; default credentials changed; Identify (ID): Modem included in device inventory; Detect (DE): Firmware version tracked against manufacturer security advisories
threats.notes: Owner-managed modem — full admin access available. Control Effectiveness Rating (CER) reflects assumed post-hardening state

threats.description: Work laptop enumeration from compromised home network device
threats.citation: MITRE ATT&CK T1018; T1021; Verizon DBIR 2024 — lateral movement in home network environments
threats.controls: Protect (PR): Employer-managed endpoint controls in place; assumed post-hardening network segmentation reduces lateral movement paths; Identify (ID): Work laptop included in device inventory
threats.notes: Endpoint controls managed by employer. Control Effectiveness Rating (CER) reflects assumed post-hardening network segmentation — to be validated at May 2026 reassessment

threats.description: Weak WiFi authentication enabling unauthorized home network access
threats.citation: CISA Advisory AA22-335A; CVE-2011-5053 WPS PIN brute force; NIST SP 800-97
threats.controls: Protect (PR): WPA3 or WPA2 encryption enabled; strong passphrase in place; WiFi Protected Setup (WPS) disabled; Detect (DE): Router logging monitors for unauthorized connection attempts
threats.notes: Control Effectiveness Rating (CER) reflects assumed post-hardening state — encryption standard and WPS status to be verified at May 2026 reassessment

threats.description: Credential harvesting from personal data repository via compromised network share access
threats.citation: MITRE ATT&CK T1039 Data from Network Shared Drive; T1078 Valid Accounts; Verizon DBIR 2024
threats.controls: Protect (PR): Share access restricted to designated devices via private network configuration; Govern (GV): Data sensitivity classification in progress; Detect (DE): Share access logging to be implemented
threats.notes: Highest Domain 1 and Domain 2 scoring home network threat. Share access logging is a near-term priority control gap. Control Effectiveness Rating (CER) reflects assumed post-hardening state
